steps.title: Track the concern and findings
steps.content: The text first explains why pteropods were thought to be vulnerable to ocean acidification. It then presents findings that intact periostracum prevents shell dissolution and that pteropods can rebuild the inner shell wall when damage occurs.

steps.title: Reject absent claims
steps.content: A calls for more research, B misstates calcium carbonate as protecting the periostracum, and C discusses altered behavior over time. The text instead presents findings that weaken a concern about shell damage. The answer is D.
